43:
True to his word, after enduring years of grueling training, the once-scrawny lad grew into a brave and strong knight. So moved was the princess by the boy's pure heart and determination, that she pleaded with her father to consent to their marriage.
Having learned years ago that his daughter was not to be denied, he did so with a smile.
